title: SpaceX shares fall on stock market despite computing deal with Reflection AI
summary: SpaceX shares fall sharply after its IPO, while analysts debate its high valuation and the impact of its multimillion-dollar deal with the AI startup.

title: Advances in US-Iran talks boost global markets
summary: Peace talks advance with an agreed roadmap, 60-day oil licenses, and the expectation of a quick reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Global markets mixed: Wall Street divided while Europe and Asia rise
summary: World stock exchanges trade without a clear direction while investors digest progress in geopolitical talks and contrasting moves in the technology sector.

title: Alan Greenspan, legendary Federal Reserve chairman, dies at age 100
summary: The former central banker, known as 'The Maestro', leaves a deep legacy in US monetary policy over recent decades.

title: Semiconductors on the rise: Micron rises on deal with Anthropic and SanDisk soars
summary: The chip and storage sector recovers on strategic artificial intelligence agreements and shifts in market perceptions regarding memory companies.

title: Alphabet plunges more than 6% due to AI talent exodus
summary: Shares of the tech giant tumble on the departure of its leading AI scientists to OpenAI and Anthropic, and growing legal risks.

title: Roblox falls 8% on weak growth of concurrent active users
summary: Shares of the video game platform plunge after reporting stagnation in the number of concurrent users during the month of May.

title: EasyJet rejects a £4.7 billion takeover offer from Castlelake
summary: The low-cost airline believes the private equity firm's offer undervalues its growth prospects and strategic independence.

title: Lucid Group announces 18% workforce reduction in the United States
summary: The luxury electric vehicle manufacturer continues its financial restructuring plan to reduce operating costs.

title: SoundHound AI looks to recover after falling 30% so far this year
summary: Analysts debate the prospects of the voice artificial intelligence company to achieve a market rebound.

title: Super Micro Computer soars 12% after upgrade from GF Securities
summary: Shares of the server manufacturer rise sharply on optimistic growth prospects in the AI infrastructure market.

title: Belgium begins process to sell 20% of its stake in Belfius Bank
summary: The Belgian government begins the partial privatization process of the bank, seeking to maximize value for taxpayers.

title: Markets react to Starmer's departure and diplomatic progress with Iran
summary: The British pound shows volatility as investors analyze the leadership change in the Labour Party and progress in talks with Iran.

title: Bitcoin and major cryptocurrencies rise in a session of widespread caution
summary: Major cryptocurrencies rebound as the market awaits new regulatory signals and institutional adoption in the sector.

title: TD Cowen reveals its top mid-cap stock for the year 2026
summary: The investment bank bets on a mid-cap company with high growth potential for the next financial year.

title: MapLight Therapeutics soars on the stock market without apparent corporate news
summary: Shares of the biopharmaceutical company rise sharply on the day, generating speculation among retail investors.

title: IBEX 35 hits new highs and Santander surpasses Inditex as the most valuable company
summary: The Spanish index approaches 19,600 points driven by the banking sector, with Santander surpassing Inditex in market capitalization.

title: German government refuses to sell its stake in Commerzbank, defying Unicredit
summary: The German government and Italian bank Unicredit remain in a standoff over control of the German bank, with the Bund resisting giving up its share package.

title: Uber board sued for alleged systemic compliance failures
summary: A class-action lawsuit accuses the company's board of systematically ignoring safety violations and cases of sexual abuse on its platform.

title: Hochtief joins the Dax index after tripling its stock market value in one year
summary: The German construction company ascends to Germany's leading stock index, reflecting its strong growth and international expansion over the past year.
